tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Fall is an especially great jerkbait time — forage has been growing all year, so use bigger jerkbaits. Always fish windy areas over calm spots — wind makes bass aggressive and looking up. Start and finish retrieves with slack line for best side-to-side action. Chrome Sexy Shad on sunny days for maximum flash.'

KVD: 'No other lure can pull bass from farther away. If you can see bottom at 20ft, that's still shallow enough for jerkbaits. Adjust cadence daily — let bass tell you what they want. Cold water = longer pauses, warm water = more active retrieve. Always start erratic.'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Jerkbait cadence: always start and finish with slack in your line — this gives the bait its best side-to-side action. Experiment every day and let bass tell you what they want. Cold water = longer pauses. Warm water = more active and erratic retrieve. The clearer the water, the more action in the retrieve.'
